overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character traversing a harsh snowy wilderness. The character jogs along a frozen riverbank, crosses shallow water, and pushes through dense snow-laden pine forests in a continuous journey through the wintry landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy riverbank path in mountainous forest

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily along the snow-covered riverbank with a rifle slung on back, heading toward the water

entered.detail: partially frozen river flowing parallel to the path with dark water visible
rustic split-rail wooden fence running along the left side of the path
tall evergreen trees heavily laden with snow creating a dense forest backdrop
small wooden cabin barely visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character moves steadily along a snow-covered path beside a partially frozen river. A wooden fence runs parallel on the left while snow-heavy pine trees line the route. The atmosphere is cold and desolate with falling snow and overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with snow-covered rocks

events.description: character steps into the shallow river water and begins wading across
character exits the water onto the opposite snow-covered bank

agents.ego_description: carefully wading through the shallow river water, stepping on submerged rocks to cross to the other side

entered.detail: dark flowing water with visible current and snow-covered stones beneath the surface
large boulders capped with snow lining the far riverbank

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shallow river and wades across, with water splashing around their boots. Snow-covered rocks emerge on the approaching bank as the character navigates the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense snowy forest path with overhanging branches

events.description: character pushes through dense snow-laden pine branches that temporarily obscure the camera view
wooden fence switches from left side to right side of the path as the trail curves

agents.ego_description: continuing along the riverbank through increasingly dense forest, pushing through heavy snow-covered pine branches that hang low over the path

entered.detail: heavy snow-laden pine boughs hanging low over the path that the character must push through

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the character continues through deeper snow in a denser section of forest. The path becomes more enclosed as the character pushes through heavy snow-laden pine branches that temporarily block the view. The wooden fence reappears on the right side as the trail curves along the riverbank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a desolate wintry wilderness that shifts from an open riverbank into a dense, enclosed forest. It begins with the character moving steadily along a snow-covered path beside a partially frozen river, flanked by a wooden fence and heavy pine trees under an overcast, snowing sky. As the character leaves the path, the scene transitions into the shallow river, where water splashes around their boots while they navigate toward snow-covered rocks on the opposite bank. The camera then follows the character into a thicker section of the woods, where the environment becomes more claustrophobic as they push through low-hanging, snow-laden pine branches. Finally, the trail curves back along the riverbank, with the wooden fence reappearing on the right as the character continues through the deep snow.
